states_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns states (1rujufs)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-93"

states_length.sql_string:
---- Length states (1rujufs)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-93")

states_data.sql_string:
---- Data states 1rujufs
SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-93"

turnout_data_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns turnout_data (nw19ui)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    total_voters,
    voted_count,
    turnout_pct
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qh"

turnout_data_length.sql_string:
---- Length turnout_data (nw19ui)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    total_voters,
    voted_count,
    turnout_pct
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qh")

turnout_data_data.sql_string:
---- Data turnout_data nw19ui
SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    total_voters,
    voted_count,
    turnout_pct

where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qh"

state_turnout_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns state_turnout (2bsozy)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    sum(voted_count) as total_voted,
    sum(total_voters) as total_registered,
    sum(voted_count)::numeric / sum(total_voters) as turnout_pct
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
group by state
order by turnout_pct desc
) AS "inputQuery-Bb"

state_turnout_length.sql_string:
---- Length state_turnout (2bsozy)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    sum(voted_count) as total_voted,
    sum(total_voters) as total_registered,
    sum(voted_count)::numeric / sum(total_voters) as turnout_pct
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
group by state
order by turnout_pct desc
) AS "inputQuery-Bb")
